title: anthyllis alpicola
intro: Anthyllis alpicola, also known as Alpine Kidney Vetch, is a perennial plant species in the legume family that grows in high-altitude mountainous regions. The medicinal properties of Anthyllis alpicola lie in its ability to act as a diuretic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to relieve symptoms of urinary tract infections, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health. Anthyllis alpicola can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat kidney stones and other kidney-related issues.
